page_content:
MUSC643 Seminar in Solo Vocal Literature | (3 Credits)

An intensive study of solo vocal literature from its origin to the present. Prerequisite: MUSC443; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.

MUSC644 Seminar in Solo Vocal Literature II (3 Credits)

A continuation of MUSC 643 with an emphasis on areas of individual interest.

Prerequisite: MUSC643; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
